subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I know not by what remembrance to remember Thee as befitteth the station of Thy presence, for the remembrances of all else beside Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لا اعلم بای ذکر اذکرک مایلیق لشان حضرتک لان اذکار مادونک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
